notableEvents.label: Brayan Rocchio pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brayan Rocchio singles on a sharp ground ball to right fielder Braden Montgomery.

notableEvents.label: David Fry pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: David Fry walks. Brayan Rocchio to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Manzardo reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Colson Montgomery. Chase DeLauter to 2nd. Chase DeLauter advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by shortstop Colson Montgomery.

notableEvents.label: Randal Grichuk pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Randal Grichuk flies out to right fielder Chase DeLauter.
